rawFiles.name: wikimedia-image-license-review.json
rawFiles.notes: Local license and attribution review manifest generated from Wikimedia Commons API imageinfo metadata.

rawFiles.name: image-assets-manifest.approved.json
rawFiles.notes: Local generated WebP/AVIF variant manifest for approved image candidates.

transforms: Collected candidate image URLs from Wikidata image statements.
Downloaded reviewed Wikimedia Commons files locally.
Fetched Wikimedia Commons imageinfo metadata for license and attribution.
Generated WebP and AVIF responsive variants for the OpenSyria CDN key namespace.
Stored attribution metadata next to CDN variant URLs in data/assets.json.
reviewNotes: Historical optional campus image batch. Superseded by the fresh official-logo batch after the R2 cleanup; these campus image records are no longer retained in data/assets.json.
